fields.evidence: What triggered detection: agent observation, failed task, missing file
fields.scope: root | [project-name] — root = cross-project gap, project-name = internal to that project
fields.proposed_expansion: One sentence: what file or content would close this gap.

scope_rules.root: Gap spans two or more projects, or affects workspace-level infrastructure
scope_rules.[project-name]: Gap is internal to one project — live in that project's _meta/gaps/
